category_sources: source_facts.description says Dependency manager for Cocoa projects; official CocoaPods Guides say CocoaPods manages library dependencies for Xcode projects.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cocoapods; official homepage and guides use CocoaPods capitalization.
docs_sources: Official CocoaPods Guides site is the dedicated documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/CocoaPods/CocoaPods, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official guides identify CocoaPods as dependency management for Cocoa/Xcode projects.
